992 INTRVNS_MDCTN_ADMSN_CD INTRVNS_MDCTN_ADMSN_CD O0110H1A Other: IV Medications (Admission) CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident received IV medications days one through three (on admission) of becoming a resident of the facility. 0=No
1=Yes effective 10/01/2023
